formulas.name: The Partition of India
formulas.notes: A key event in Indian history, resulting in the division of British India into India and Pakistan

formulas.name: The Radcliffe Line
formulas.notes: A boundary line demarcating the border between India and Pakistan, named after Sir Cyril Radcliffe

formulas.name: The Cabinet Mission Plan
formulas.notes: A plan proposed by the British Cabinet in 1946 to grant independence to India with a federal structure

formulas.name: The Lahore Resolution
formulas.notes: A resolution passed by the All-India Muslim League in 1940 demanding a separate homeland for Muslims in India

formulas.name: The Indian Independence Act of 1947
formulas.notes: An Act passed by the British Parliament to grant independence to India and Pakistan

formulas.name: Lord Mountbatten's Role
formulas.notes: Lord Louis Mountbatten played a crucial role in the transfer of power from the British to India and Pakistan
